name: Spectra
description: While its intended design is for deep space construction, the concentrated laser beam of the Spectra is highly effective against organic and synthetic enemies.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: While its intended design is for deep space construction, the concentrated laser beam of the Spectra is highly effective against organic and synthetic enemies.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issue of Thrax enemy Spectral Forms re-spawning with 40% Max Health. 
Fixed issues of Thrax Spectral Forms returning to their Corporeal Form at 2.5x their original health.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sevagoth’s Gloom FX being applied to dead Amalgam Spectralysts.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes:
Errant Specters in the Granum Void have a chance to drop Spectral Debris. This Resource is used in the Hound Component crafting process.
Updated Sequence Burn Spectra Mod from +Range to +Beam Length.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed being unable to use the Xoris as a melee weapon after detonating it while Chroma’s Spectral Scream is active.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
Spectral Scream: Removed Status Chance stat, now always 100%. Enemies hit by the breath will chain the damage to one other enemy outside the breath. You can now swap between Elementals on the fly with Spectral Scream 
*Increased Spectral Scream damage from 200 to 400 Damage Per Second at Max Rank!
Increased Spectral Scream damage from 200 to 400 Damage Per Second at Max Rank. This, combined with 100% Status Chance and Chaining should lead to some more deadly or useful scenarios, especially since you can use all 4 elements now!

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 27.5.6 + 27.5.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed several script errors that could occur if an Amalgam Osprey were killed just as it attempted to create Spectralysts.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed dual wielding the Spectra Vandal with a Glaive causing the Spectra Vandal to look like the ordinary Spectra.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed your Arch-Gun constantly replaying it’s equip animation after casting Chroma’s Spectral Scream ability twice.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Passive / Spectral Scream descriptions not stating that the Elemental effects are now dictated by the emissives colours, not the energy colours as given in the Ability / Mod descriptions.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Passive / Spectral Scream descriptions not stating that the Elemental effects are now dictated by the emissives colours, not the energy colours as given in the Ability / Mod descriptions.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed various audio issues with Chroma’s Spectral Scream ability.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed seeing 2 different Energy colors when casting Chroma’s Spectral Scream.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Update 23
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream not using Energy colors.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream Energy stat on Abilities screen displaying as 0 after you've used it once. 
Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream breaking if you run out of Energy while in Operator.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed a script error when casting Chroma’s Spectral Scream ability. 
Spectra magazine capacity increased to 30 in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.12.0
patchlogs.changes: Chroma can no longer jump or sprint when using Spectral Scream.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.additions: The Plains of Eidolon is an ancient battlefield where Sentients fought to destroy the Orokin Tower that the Ostrons now call home. The Sentients failed and died, leaving behind an ancient graveyard throughout the Landscape. The towering Spectral Sentients known as Eidolons survived the Old War. Every night they ascend from the waters and wander the Plains in search of what they’ve lost. Small, deadly Sentients appear throughout the Plains and protect the Eidolon. At daybreak, they disappear and wait for night to emerge once more.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream idle animation not playing the hunch over animation.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a rare crash from starting a mission with a beam style weapon (Atomos, Spectra, etc).

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error with Chroma’s Spectral Scream on Dedicated Servers.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Amprex, Flux Rifle, Glaxion, Embolist, Gammacor series, Nukor, Spectra, Panthera, Synapse, Sobek, Drakgoon and Lanka can now be used in Conclave!

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove
patchlogs.changes: Chroma’s Spectral Scream status chance now 100% in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed not seeing squadmates using certain Warframe abilities (Sound Quake, Spectral Scream, Elemental Ward, Undertow, Absorb, Mend & Maim, and Sandstorm) when joining a mission in progress.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Drain-Per-Second and other adjustments has been made on the following Toggled Abilities:Chroma’s Spectral Scream now drains 3 Energy.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream preventing players from being able to use quick melee.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.1.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma playing idle animations when using Spectral Scream as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/428896-chroma-does-idle-animations-during-spectral-scream/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream being affected by rift status.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Fixed Chroma’s Spectral Scream not equipping a weapon once deactivated if the ability was used while holding a scanner.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.11
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed visual issue with Flux and Spectra laser beam appearance.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive
patchlogs.fixes: Update 14.2.0: Avalanche Offensive Psa: The Launcher May Require You To Enter Your Windows Administrator Password To Update Your Firewall Rules.Avalanche Offensive Is On Until Monday @ 12 Noon Edt! Avalanche Offensivedefeat The Corpus Arctic Eximus!A Message From Cantis Of The Red Veil Resistance:Here'S What You'Ll Need To Dogo Forth And Take Down The Corpus Arctic Eximus, Tenno!Additions:Weapon Balance Changes:     • Grakata    • Castanas    • Ogris    • Torid    • Penta    • Lanka    • Vectis    • Vulkar    • Angstrum:    • Acrid:    • Attica:    • Spectra & Flux Rifle:    • Snipetron (+Vandal):    • Torid Changes:    • All Launchers:Key Hosting Improvements:Changes:Fixes:
